text: The world feels like a blend of sterility and curiosity. Through the pane of glass, I sense anticipation, as though knowledge waits just behind those doors, ready to be shared. Stepping closer, I am drawn to the vibrant display of R+D, a celebration of human ingenuity and the unknown. Here, in this space of innovation, I feel both humbled and invigorated. It is a place where minds meet to ponder, create, and learn together.
